zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha Beauffou於大約1165年出生在英國波克夏塔其哈姆時，她的父親Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham23歲，母親Agatha de Beaufoe23歲。她於1186年與Reginald Aguillon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1220年在英國享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha Beauffou于大约1165年出生在英国波克夏塔其哈姆时，她的父亲Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham23岁，母亲Agatha de Beaufoe23岁。她于1186年与Reginald Aguillon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1220年在英国享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha Beauffou was born about 1165, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, her father, Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham, was 23 and her mother, Agatha de Beaufoe, was 23. She married Reginald Aguillon in 1186. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1220, in England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agatha Beauffou est née environ 1165, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Beaufoe, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald Aguillon en 1186. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha Beauffou um 1165 in Thatcham, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham 23 und ihre Mutter Agatha de Beaufoe 23. Sie hat 1186 Reginald Aguillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1220 im Alter von 56 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha Beauffou è nata il circa 1165 nel Thatcham, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Agatha de Beaufoe, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Reginald Aguillon nel 1186. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1220, nel England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha Beauffouが約1165年にイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムで生まれた時，父Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatchamは23歳，母Agatha de Beaufoeは23歳であった。1186年にReginald Aguillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1220年にイギリスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha Beauffou(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 버크실르 댓챔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Beaufoe(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1186년 Reginald Aguillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 영국에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Withyham, Sussex, England: Withyham, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha Beauffou nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Beaufoe, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald Aguillon em 1186. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1220, em Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha Beauffou родилась около 1165 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Beaufoe, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald Aguillon в 1186 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agatha Beauffou nació aproximadamente 1165, en Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Agatha de Beaufoe, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Reginald Aguillon en 1186. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1220, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
